# tools

```go
import "github.com/stubbedev/mongodb-mcp/internal/tools"
```

Package tools registers the MongoDB MCP tools on a server, wiring each tool to the source registry and enforcing the per\-source read\-only policy.

## Index

- [func Register\(server \*mcp.Server, res \*source.Resolver\)](<#Register>)


<a name="Register"></a>
## func Register

```go
func Register(server *mcp.Server, res *source.Resolver)
```

Register adds every MongoDB tool to the server.

Read tools are always available. Write and admin tools are always registered \(so clients can discover them\) but refuse at call time when the selected source is read\-only — see source.Registry.RequireWritable.

Each handler resolves its registry from the resolver per call, so the target database follows the calling client's MCP workspace root.
